name: Apyx Medical Corp
business: Apyx Medical Corporation sells Helium Plasma Technology products (Renuvion and J-Plasma) and the AYON Body Contouring System to the cosmetic surgery market and the hospital surgical market. The company also leverages its expertise through OEM agreements with other medical device manufacturers.

exposures.sentence: We are a surgical aesthetics company with a passion for elevating people s lives through innovative products, including its Helium Plasma Platform Technology products marketed and sold as Renuvion and the AYON Body Contouring System TM ( AYON ) in the cosmetic surgery market and J-Plasma in the hospital surgical market.

catalysts.sentence: On May 13, 2025, we announced that we had received 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA ) for AYON.
Additionally, we commenced the commercial launch of AYON in September 2025.

catalysts.event: Submitted 510(k) for label expansion of AYON to include power liposuction
catalysts.sentence: On October 13, 2025, we announced that we had submitted the 510(k) premarket notification to the FDA for the label expansion of AYON to include power liposuction.

catalysts.event: Anticipate clearance for AYON label expansion in Q2 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate receiving clearance in the second quarter 2026.
On July 28, 2025, we announced the launch of Renuvion in China following receipt of initial market clearance from the National Medical Products Administration of China.
On November 18, 2025, we entered into an underwriting agreement where we sold 2,762,431 shares of common stock at an offering price of $3.62.

catalysts.event: Filed shelf registration statement for up to $100 million
catalysts.sentence: On December 1, 2025, we filed a shelf registration statement providing us the ability to register and sell our securities in the aggregate amount up to $100 million.
